articles.title: SK Hynix Is Today’s Standout Chip Stock for an Unusual Reason
articles.summary: The company’s American depositary receipts were up as much as 8.3% by midday, but closed with a 1.1% gain at $154.03. Micron Technology SK Hynix’s biggest U.S. rival finished down 0.5%. SK Hynix plunged 14% on Thuesday.

articles.title: China’s Moonshot AI Adds More Fuel to Wall Street’s Chip Selloff
articles.summary: The surprise release of a breakthrough artificial-intelligence model from China intensified a selloff in chip stocks on Friday, fueling concerns about competition in AI and massive corporate spending that underpins its build-out. Tech stocks led a Friday selloff that by late afternoon had broadened to envelop 10 of 11 sectors in the S&P 500 index. The latest trigger was China’s Moonshot AI, which unveiled its Kimi K3 large language model on Friday.

articles.title: Here’s What Can End Micron’s Stock Pain
articles.summary: Micron closed below the $1 trillion market cap threshold on Thursday for the first time since June 5, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

articles.title: Stocks to Watch Recap: Intel, Netflix, SpaceX, Burberry
articles.summary: ↘️ Intel (INTC), Micron Technology (MU) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) slipped amid concerns about the sustainability of the AI boom. Marvell Technology (MRVL) ended the trading session up 0.2%. ↘️Netflix (NFLX): Shares fell more than 7% after the streaming company reported its weakest revenue growth in years.
